themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "The Levites were to camp around the tabernacle 'that there be no wrath upon the congregation...".

themes.label: Judgment
themes.summary: This chapter addresses wrath, judgment, condemnation, justice, or divine reckoning. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "The Levites were to camp around the tabernacle 'that there be no wrath upon the congregation...". Cross references echo "Judgment".
